sample_reviews.author: James Thornton
sample_reviews.text: Proflow replaced our old boiler quickly and efficiently. Friendly team, clean work and great value. Highly recommend.

sample_reviews.author: Sandra Mitchell
sample_reviews.text: Called them out for an emergency heating fault in the middle of winter. Responded fast and had us back up and running the same day. Brilliant service.

sample_reviews.author: David Okafor
sample_reviews.text: Very professional from start to finish. New central heating system installed to a high standard. Would use again without hesitation.

brand.usp: Proflow Heating Solutions delivers expert boiler and central heating services across Birmingham, combining Gas Safe certified workmanship with fast response times and honest, transparent pricing.
brand.about_paragraph: We're Proflow Heating Solutions, a Birmingham-based heating and plumbing company dedicated to keeping your home warm and your water flowing. Whether it's a brand new boiler installation, a central heating upgrade or an emergency callout, we bring professional expertise and a friendly approach to every job. We're fully Gas Safe registered and proud to deliver reliable, high-quality work at fair prices across Birmingham and the surrounding areas.
